title: raphanus raphanistrum subvar. niger
intro: Raphanus raphanistrum subvar. niger, also known as Black Radish or Black Charlock, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a variant of the Raphanus raphanistrum plant, characterized by its dark purple or black coloration. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Black Radish include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal properties.
